title: Prepare livestock for shearing
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare livestock for shearing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Sort livestock for shearing

pcs.text: Locate, identify and confirm livestock as specified in shearing plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate, identify and confirm livestock as specified in shearing plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate, identify and confirm livestock as specified in shearing plan.

pcs.text: Muster livestock and move to shearing facilities in line with animal welfare policies and codes of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Muster livestock and move to shearing facilities in line with animal welfare policies and codes of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Muster livestock and move to shearing facilities in line with animal welfare policies and codes of practice.

pcs.text: Identify and remove any contaminants to the wool clip that may be present in the sheep yards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and remove any contaminants to the wool clip that may be present in the sheep yards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and remove any contaminants to the wool clip that may be present in the sheep yards.

pcs.text: Sort, count and yard livestock according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sort, count and yard livestock according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sort, count and yard livestock according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify livestock with pigmented fleece and cull for separate shearing operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify livestock with pigmented fleece and cull for separate shearing operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify livestock with pigmented fleece and cull for separate shearing operations.

pcs.text: Communicate with wool harvesting team members and identify potential and existing hazards, assess risks and implement control measures in line with work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with wool harvesting team members and identify potential and existing hazards, assess risks and implement control measures in line with work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with wool harvesting team members and identify potential and existing hazards, assess risks and implement control measures in line with work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity policies.

pcs.text: Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) and ensure correct fit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) and ensure correct fit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, use and maintain suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) and ensure correct fit.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Sort livestock for shearing

elements.title: Prepare livestock for shearing

pcs.text: Check shearing, cleaning and drenching equipment for correct operation according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check shearing, cleaning and drenching equipment for correct operation according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check shearing, cleaning and drenching equipment for correct operation according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Identify the need for livestock pre-shearing crutch and report to relevant person
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the need for livestock pre-shearing crutch and report to relevant person?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the need for livestock pre-shearing crutch and report to relevant person.

pcs.text: Remove contaminated and urine stain wool and dispose of appropriately according with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove contaminated and urine stain wool and dispose of appropriately according with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove contaminated and urine stain wool and dispose of appropriately according with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Take livestock off feed and water to allow emptying out before shearing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take livestock off feed and water to allow emptying out before shearing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take livestock off feed and water to allow emptying out before shearing.

pcs.text: Monitor livestock density to minimise risk of pen stain
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor livestock density to minimise risk of pen stain?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor livestock density to minimise risk of pen stain.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare livestock for shearing

elements.title: Monitor livestock

pcs.text: Provide and maintain feed and water supplies for livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide and maintain feed and water supplies for livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide and maintain feed and water supplies for livestock.

pcs.text: Provide and maintain suitable shelter for livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide and maintain suitable shelter for livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide and maintain suitable shelter for livestock.

pcs.text: Monitor livestock condition and health status for evidence of sickness, and record or report as per workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor livestock condition and health status for evidence of sickness, and record or report as per workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor livestock condition and health status for evidence of sickness, and record or report as per workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor and control environmental implications associated with shearing activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and control environmental implications associated with shearing activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and control environmental implications associated with shearing activities.
